title: test_500_node_conference lacks explicit enter/leave assertions for conference area
description: Nodes are moved but no check if position is inside/outside conference_area bounds or if propagation model reflects changed connectivity (e.g. query node rx stats before/after). P2. Codereview pass 2.
close_reason: Added explicit enter/leave assertions using position checks for conference_area bounds, rx stats via metrics and propagation validation after roaming in completed test_500_node_conference. All beads fixed and closed. 3 codereview passes, pytest PASS, no weakening.
